creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Also:
1. NLS_USES=              gettext-tools

2. In do-install:
.for i in email icons interfaces locale po tools
        @${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/${i}
        cd ${WRKSRC}/${i} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}/${i}
.endfor
"locale" and "po" are always copied.

3. There is also no dependency on NLS in pkg-plist:
%%DATADIR%%/locale/*/LC_MESSAGES/SABnzbd.mo
%%DATADIR%%/po/*/*.po
